caption: A man sits in a studio setting, wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" written in gold lettering across the chest, and a gold watch. He is positioned behind a dark table equipped with a professional microphone on a boom arm and a black mug featuring red and white text that reads "THE TALK OUT". In the background, a white banner displays the words "UNIQUE HUSTLE" beneath a row of five stars, and blue text on the wall reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". The man is engaged in a conversation, speaking and gesturing with his hands. Across the sequence, he shifts his gaze and hand positions; he begins looking forward, then turns his head slightly to the side, and eventually gestures with his right hand while speaking. A circular logo featuring the word "TALK" appears in the bottom left corner throughout the scene.
